$comment: Mobile Progress Single Step Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Progress Single Step — one step unit within a multi-step stepper. Each unit shows a circular step indicator dot (with a number or icon inside), a connector bar to the next step, and a text label (title + description). Supports 5 states: Next, Current, Completed, Error, Warning. Supports 2 orientations (Default horizontal / Vertical), 2 indicator modes (number / icon), and 2 container types (Default text label / List item). Figma Reference: Node ID 364-4779

$component.name: Progress Single Step
$component.description: One step in a multi-step progress stepper. The component consists of: (1) an indicator dot showing the step's state via color and icon/number, (2) a connector bar (ProgressStepBar sub-component) that links this step to the next, and (3) a text label block with a bold title and a smaller description line. In Default (horizontal) orientation, the indicator, bar, and label are laid out in a row. In Vertical orientation, the indicator and bar stack vertically on the left with the label text on the right. A 'List item' container variant replaces the text label with a full ListItem row component.
$component.structure: Outer flex column (px-4px). Inner flex row: [optional vertical column: [indicator dot + connector bar]] + [label block: [title, description]] OR [List item component]. In Default orientation: [icon placeholder OR step dot] + [text label below] + [connector bar as sibling, flex-1].

state.Next: Upcoming/future step — white dot with gray/300 border, gray/400 number inside
state.Current: Active step — primary/600 dot with matching border; title+description visible
state.Completed: Finished step — primary/600 dot with check-circle icon
state.Error: Failed step — error/100 dot with error/300 border, info icon
state.Warning: Warning step — warning/100 dot with warning/300 border, warning icon; description text turns error/500 red

orientation.Default: Horizontal layout — step dot and bar in a row, label below
orientation.Vertical: Vertical layout — step dot stacked above bar (both in left column), label text to the right

icon.None: Step dot shows a step number (e.g., '1', '2') in the center
icon.True: Step dot shows a contextual icon (placeholder icon for Current/Next, check for Completed, info for Error, warning for Warning)

container.Default: Label block shows title (bold) + description text
container.List item: Label area replaced by a full ListItem row component (avatar, name, email)

subComponents.progressStepBar: progress-step-bar.json — the pill connector bar between step dots; see connector.height and connector.width.vertical

usage.contexts: Used as the repeating building block inside Progress Step. Can also be used standalone for custom stepper layouts.
usage.features: 5 states, 2 orientations, number/icon modes, text or list-item container, full HighRise stepper pattern

indicator.$comment: The circular dot that shows the step's state. Contains either a step number or a contextual icon.

size.description: Mobile progress single step indicator dot size - 20px (4xs - 20px)

border-radius.description: Mobile single step indicator dot border radius - fully circular (rounded-[10px] in Figma)

width.description: Mobile single step indicator dot border width - 1px (default - 1px)

icon-size.description: Mobile single step indicator icon/status image size - 12px (xs - 12px)

color.$comment: Background and border colors for the indicator dot, keyed by state

background.description: Mobile single step indicator background for Next (upcoming) state - white

border.description: Mobile single step indicator border for Next state - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

background.description: Mobile single step indicator background for Current state - primary/blue/600 - #155eef

border.description: Mobile single step indicator border for Current state - primary/blue/600 - #155eef (same as background)

background.description: Mobile single step indicator background for Completed state - primary/blue/600 - #155eef

border.description: Mobile single step indicator border for Completed state - primary/blue/600 - #155eef

background.description: Mobile single step indicator background for Error state - error/100 - #fee4e2 (very light red tint)

border.description: Mobile single step indicator border for Error state - error/300 - #fda29b (medium red)

background.description: Mobile single step indicator background for Warning state - warning/100 - #fef0c7 (very light yellow tint)

border.description: Mobile single step indicator border for Warning state - warning/300 - #fec84b (medium yellow)

number.$comment: Step number text shown inside the dot when icon=None mode. Not shown for Completed state (shows check icon instead).

typography.description: Mobile single step indicator number typography - 10px Semibold, 15px line-height (Figma shows 10.714px/14.286px — a mobile scaling artifact; {font.body.semibold.2xs} is the nearest token)

next.description: Mobile single step indicator number color for Next state - gray/400 - #98a2b3 (muted, indicating the step is not yet active)

active.description: Mobile single step indicator number color for Current state - white (legible against the primary/600 blue background)

title.$comment: Bold step title shown in the label block. Visible for Current, Error, and Warning states in Default orientation; for all states in Vertical orientation.

typography.description: Mobile single step title typography - 13px Semibold, 18px line-height (font/size/md, font/weight/semibold, font/line-height/md)

color.description: Mobile single step title text color - gray/900 - #101828 (darkest gray, high contrast heading)

description.$comment: Secondary step description line below the title. Color turns error/red in Error and Warning states.

typography.description: Mobile single step description typography - 12px Medium, 17px line-height (font/size/sm, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/sm)

default.description: Mobile single step description text color (Next/Current/Completed states) - gray/500 - #667085

error.description: Mobile single step description text color (Error and Warning states) - error/500 - #f04438 (reinforces the problem state)

layout.$comment: Spacing and sizing for the step unit container and internal arrangement

horizontal.description: Mobile single step outer container horizontal padding - 4px (px-[4px] in Figma)

gap.description: Mobile single step gap between indicator dot (or icon) and the label block in Default (horizontal) orientation - 8px (gap-[8px])

label-gap.description: Mobile single step gap between title and description within the label block - 4px (gap-[4px])

connector.$comment: The ProgressStepBar connector bar dimensions within the step layout

height.description: Mobile single step connector bar height - 4px (h-[4px] in Figma; thinner than the standalone ProgressStepBar which is 8px)

default.description: Mobile single step connector bar width in Default orientation - stretches to fill remaining row space between indicator and edge

vertical.description: Mobile single step connector bar width in Vertical orientation - 35.5px fixed (bar is rendered horizontally at this width then rotated -90° to become the vertical connector between step dots)
